summary: Live health, status and catalog for the MCP-Host platform itself — the first-party monitoring MCP for the whole store.

tools.name: platform_status
tools.description: Report live MCP-Host platform status: overall health, version, storage backend, number of mounted providers, uptime in seconds, and any active configuration warnings.

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: List every MCP currently mounted on the platform with its id, display name, discipline, exposed tool names, demo flag, and tool-description quality (TDQS) score.

tools.name: check_provider
tools.description: Run the health check of one mounted provider, identified by its id, and return that provider's readiness payload, or an error if it is not mounted.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Connectivity echo: returns the optional message you send plus a server timestamp, proving end-to-end reachability of a hosted MCP over the wire.
